method: two independent model families, blind to each other: A=Claude (Workflow wja6ryry5, 7 agents Opus+Sonnet, 60 findings) + B=Codex gpt-5.5 xhigh via codex CLI exec+review (29 findings). Read-only.
deviation: codex /codex:* slash-commands not agent-invocable this session -> ran codex CLI directly (same engine, blind); no degraded fallback needed
verdict: FIX-THEN-SHIP (harness-level). Idea's prereg guards are sound; current CODE under-implements them and the synthetic gate is partly a rubber stamp. Do NOT cite the synthetic CONFIRM as method validation.
confirmed_criticals: C1 oracle.py:78-80 U mislabels unlearned nonlinear structure as biology (linear Ridge; Claude numeric U=0.989 for deterministic nonlinear gene)
C2 oracle.py:73-74 sigma2_reg identically 0 on all paths (mandatory subtraction silently absent)
C3 feasibility_breast.py:67 f' anti-circularity arm is same Ridge reseeded, not independent architecture
C4 simulator.py:91 + oracle.py:71 synthetic dropout only in visium but oracle fits Xenium -> gate's not-dropout result guaranteed by construction
C5 xenium_io.py:306-315 matched_bins cross-section bin-key mismatch corrupts the noise floor
single_model_verified: SB1 metrics.py:27 grid_weights radius 1.5 -> nan Moran's on 100um real coords (Codex-only, VERIFIED real)
SB2 fetch_data.sh:21 declare -A breaks entry-point on macOS bash 3.2 (Codex-only, VERIFIED: /bin/bash=3.2.57)
SA1 oracle.py:71-72 2x noise-floor/target mismatch z_est=0.5(r1+r2) (Claude-only, numerically verified)
SA2 xenium_io.py:225-233 rigid_register reflection flip can mirror registration (Claude-only)
cross_model_payoff: each family's code-reviewer caught a CRITICAL real-data bug the other was blind to (Codex: grid_weights nan + bash3.2; Claude: 2x noise floor + reflection flip) -> two-family design justified
scope_honesty: audit is read-only; NO fixes applied. Findings concern code committed in rollouts 7-8 (incl. this session's loader). Synthetic gate green != real result and != method validation.
promotion_gate: Audit complete. Fix pass is SEPARATE + requires approval. Top order: rebuild failable gate (C4/C3/M2) -> substrate/claim scope (C1) -> sigma2_reg+spatial split (C2/H5) -> fix broken real path (SB2/SB1/C5/SB4) -> repro stamp (H6/SA4). STOP - no fixes this pass.
summary: Rollout 9 = cross-model read-only audit @ 4975b2b. Claude (60) + Codex gpt-5.5 (29) blind. 5 CONFIRMED criticals: U-relabels-nonlinear-bias-as-biology, sigma2_reg=0, fake f', construction-guaranteed gate, matched_bins key mismatch. Each family caught a critical the other missed (grid_weights nan, bash3.2 / 2x-noise-floor, reflection-flip). Verdict FIX-THEN-SHIP: harden the harness + implement the prereg's own controls before any real run; synthetic CONFIRM is NOT method validation. No fixes applied.
